name: rejection
description: Polite rejection email. Should produce a closed_lost stage signal with high confidence and minimal new relationships.

input.subject: Re: Your application — Senior Platform Engineer
input.bodyText:
Hi Lucas,

Thanks for your interest in the Senior Platform Engineer role at Vercel and for the time you put into the take-home.

After careful consideration, we've decided to move forward with another candidate. The bar was extremely high this round and the decision was not easy. We'd love to stay in touch — please feel free to apply again in 6+ months if anything new opens up.

Wishing you the best,
The Vercel Talent Team

stageSignal.reason: 'We've decided to move forward with another candidate' is an explicit rejection.

expected.summary: Vercel rejected Lucas's Senior Platform Engineer application after the take-home, inviting reapplication in 6+ months.
